meaning: n.属于蜘蛛类的节肢动物
examples: The tiny arachnid, found in Australia, shows off a rainbow of colors to impress nearby females.
The man poured petrol down the hole and then lit a match in an attempt to kill the offending arachnid.
The unprecedented flooding in Pakistan disrupted the lives of 20 million people, but it also affected the country's arachnid population.
The lab has shown the arachnid application informally at conferences, but hasn't yet published any papers on the program for peer review.
Rohayu is the top attraction at the popular Reptile's Adventure Promotions insect and arachnid show in Seremban, 60 km south of Kuala Lumpur.
